CustomField.description: MR Snapshots are created every time an event that affects the Invoiced/Collected MR happens (e.g. Creation of Invoice, Payment). Check this to prevent creation of MR Snapshots.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: MR Snapshots are created every time an event that affects the Invoiced/Collected MR happens (e.g. Creation of Invoice, Payment). Check this to prevent creation of MR Snapshots.
CustomField.label: Z_Unused_2103 Disable MR Snapshots
